headline: runtime preview system for all 341 scalar rows (135 default-previewable with real controls, dead-man countdown for gated rows)
36 input/cursor rows proven and armed by live proofs
Safe Live Save Mode: runtime-proven autoreload control gating every save
first active real config write pilot passed its fifteen-gate path
production Save integration: every UI save routes through gated paths
structured-family gated persistence with live-proven record shapes
family record picker: existing animation records (speed) and bezier curves (all four control points) with supervised preview and gated Save
Safe Live Save Mode persistence: misc:disable_autoreload = true saved as default through the gated scalar Save (user-chosen, never automatic)
Hyprland 0.55.4 migration audit: zero drift against the trusted export, with a repeatable refresh workflow

breakingChanges: the app now writes the active config through gated Save paths (v0.1.0 was read-only in production paths); every write is gated on Safe Live Save Mode, backed up, written once, and reread-verified
remainingBlockersForRelease: user approval of the release decision
merge decision for structured-family-editors-unified into main (34 commits ahead)
version bump in Cargo.toml (still 0.1.0) and tag choice (suggested: v0.2.0)
review of the release notes draft in docs/RELEASE-DECISION.md
one manual test pass of the manual test plan in docs/RELEASE-DECISION.md
knownLimitations: 21 rows remain unproven pending hardware: 18 touch-family rows and 3 secondary-device rows (left_handed, rotation, resolve_binds_by_sym); they stay disarmed and are not release blockers
five structured families (monitor, bind, gesture, device, permission) stay blocked for editing with honest reasons
the scalar config model projects flat colon syntax (the same syntax the gated Save writes); block-syntax values in user configs are not projected as scalar current values
the data model tracks v0.55.2; the live 0.55.4 compositor was audited at zero drift, so no model migration is required yet
recommendation: Prepare a v0.2.0 release candidate from this branch after user approval: merge to main, bump Cargo.toml to 0.2.0, tag, and build dist artifacts with the existing release process. Do none of this automatically.
releaseCandidateMaterials: docs/RELEASE-DECISION.md (release notes draft, changelog draft, artifact checklist, test checklist, known limitations, manual test plan)
